summary: The user sought assistance with ordering pet food online for their pets, Luna and Max, and discussed their experiences with various retailers, including Chewy.com and Petco. They mentioned specific purchases, discounts received, and considerations for their pets' dietary needs.
facts: The user has a pet dog named Max who is switching to a grain-free diet. The user purchased a 20-pound bag of Acana dog food from PetSmart for Max. The user has a pet cat named Luna. The user bought Luna's wet food from Chewy.com and is considering using their Autoship program for discounts on repeat purchases. The user received a 10% discount on their first purchase at Petco when they bought a new cat litter box on February 15th. The user signed up for Petco's loyalty program to receive the discount. The user plans to remind their sister to return a pet carrier they lent her last month.
